title: PapaMods Created
description: Modpack focused around Create, the Let's Do bundle and a few mods more.
body:
Welcome to **PapaMods Created** a Minecraft modpack that blends exploration, automation, and immersive gameplay!

With the Create mod and it's addons, you can craft amazing machines and automate your resource gathering, making your adventures more efficient.

Discover new aesthetic culinary delights with the Let's Do collection. Explore a richer and engaging world as you explore diverse and dynamic biomes filled with structures and treasures.

Note that I made this modpack for a private server, but feel free on using it on your own!
